startNode.name: Rocket
startNode.info: Rust生态中注重开发体验的Web框架，以类型安全和简洁声明式语法为核心特色，通过宏简化路由与请求处理逻辑。

endNode.name: core philosophies
endNode.info: Rocket设计的三大核心理念：Security, correctness, and developer experience are paramount；All request handling information should be typed and self-contained；Decisions should not be forced。

startNode.name: core philosophies
startNode.info: Rocket设计的三大核心理念：Security, correctness, and developer experience are paramount；All request handling information should be typed and self-contained；Decisions should not be forced。

endNode.name: Security, correctness, and developer experience are paramount
endNode.info: Rocket的第一个核心理念：The path of least resistance should lead you to the most secure, correct web application。

startNode.name: core philosophies
startNode.info: Rocket设计的三大核心理念：Security, correctness, and developer experience are paramount；All request handling information should be typed and self-contained；Decisions should not be forced。

endNode.name: All request handling information should be typed and self-contained
endNode.info: Rocket的第二个核心理念：handlers are regular functions with regular arguments。

startNode.name: core philosophies
startNode.info: Rocket设计的三大核心理念：Security, correctness, and developer experience are paramount；All request handling information should be typed and self-contained；Decisions should not be forced。

endNode.name: Decisions should not be forced
endNode.info: Rocket的第三个核心理念：Templates, serialization, sessions, and just about everything else are all pluggable, optional components。
